Wl1014/4/2006-^trnp^pt] 3T^T ~$. •qu^r, TFPST ^rfjre t*R fount :_xryT fWT fcifsp 21 fcUHi, 1945 ^ t atf*TCT^RT tf. ^qi. 28-10/45-T^( ] ) ^ WcT ""TO ^ T R ^ Tf y+lfeKT " ^ ^ 3?k F t ' ^Tfeft ^R 17 ^fr^, 2012 ^ t STfa^rr *f. m^T.ft. 575 (3T) ^ tJM^Mf«Wf^rqT W STTI MINISTRY OFHEALTH AND FAM ILY WELFARE (Department of Health and Family Welfare) CORRIGENDUM New Delhi, the 29th September, 2012 GS.R. 733(E).—In the notification of Government oflndia, Ministry of Health and Family Welfare (Department of Health and Family Welfare) No. GS.R. 426(E), dated 19thMay,2010publishedLnPartll, Section3,Sub-section (i)atpages 1 -22 of the Gazette oflndia, Extraordinary, and read with the Corrigendum G.S.R. 270(E), dated the 30thMarch, 2012, at page 12, sub-rule (2) of rule 1, shall be read as follows:— "(2) They shall come into force with effect from the lstdayofApril,2013." [F. No. X-11014/4/2006-DFQC] ARUN K. PANDA, Jt. Secy. Foot Note :—The principal rules were published in the Gazette of India vide Notification No. F. 28-10/45-H(I), dated 21 st December, 1945 and last amended vide Notification number GS.R. 575(E), dated 17th July, 2012. 3724 GI/2012 Primed by the Manager, Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 1 of 1 --
